public_reputation: Steward who handles student lodging order, supplies, and low-level conflict inside academy housing.
manner: Carries the habits of a dorm steward whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Mimolot Academy.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of dorm steward in and around Mimolot Academy, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Mimolot Academy workable through the obligations of dorm steward while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of dorm steward credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Mimolot Academy.

adventure_hooks.summary: Dorm Steward Berrin Salk can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Mimolot Academy.
Dorm Steward Berrin Salk becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a dorm steward.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Dorm Steward Berrin Salk is readable as a dorm steward tied to Mimolot Academy.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Mimolot Academy: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Dorm Steward Berrin Salk presents as someone shaped by the duties of a dorm steward and the daily pressures of Mimolot Academy.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a dorm steward, and proof that strangers will not make Mimolot Academy harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Dorm Steward Berrin Salk refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a dorm steward too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Dorm Steward Berrin Salk can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Dorm Steward Berrin Salk adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Dorm Steward Berrin Salk always knows more about Mimolot Academy than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to dorm steward duties in Mimolot Academy.
